name: Savory Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. Drizzle the melted margarine over the hot popcorn and toss to coat evenly.
3. Stir together the paprika, garlic salt, and ground red pepper.
4. Sprinkle the popcorn with the spice mixture and toss again to combine.
5. Makes 2 servings (1 1/2 cup serving): 73 calories, 2 g protein, 8 g carbohydrate, 4 g total fat, 1 g saturated fat, 151 mg sodium, 11 mg potassium; 1/2 bread exchange; 1/2 fat exchange.
